teamIdRequired: teamId is required when scope is "team".
orgNameTaken: An org data source named "{name}" already exists.
teamNameTaken: A team data source named "{name}" already exists.
orgForbidden: Only admins can manage org data sources.
teamForbidden: Only admins or team owners can manage team data sources.
ownerOnly: This operation is reserved for the owner.
browseOnlyFileshare: Folder browsing is only available for file-share sources (SMB/SFTP/WebDAV).
notFileShare: The source is not a shared folder (SMB/SFTP/WebDAV).
localRequiresIdentity: Access to local files requires an identity.
fileTooLargeIngest: File too large for indexing ({size} bytes > {max}).
